record.field:
Dear {customer_name},
This is a notice for your loan {loan_number}. Current POS: {current_pos} Claim amount: {claim_amount}
Please contact the assigned team to proceed.
Regards, BharatNyay Team

Dear {customer_name},
Your case for loan {loan_number} has moved to Appointment of Arbitrator stage. Please cooperate with process updates.
Regards, BharatNyay Team
